creator: ohaucke@gadean.de
text:
Sorry for the spam, i'm confused.
I reverted my modifications to the rc.d script and it's still working.

I've tested it previously with SIGHUP and it did not work, but now it does?
Just to be sure, i created a complete new vm with a fresh freebsd install, to verify that i didn't miss anything (again), it still works.

Again, i'm so sorry!
